sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Ross Stores Q3 FY2025: 동일점포매출 7% 성장, EPS 1.58달러로 가이던스 초과

keyPoints.text: Q3 FY2025 매출은 전년 동기 대비 증가한 56억 달러, 동일점포매출은 강하게 성장했다.
EPS는 1.58달러로 전년 동기 1.48달러 대비 개선됐으며, 순이익은 5억 1,200만 달러(전년 동기 4억 8,900만 달러)를 기록했다.
관세 관련 비용이 Q3 EPS에 약 0.05달러의 부정적 영향을 미쳤다.

riskChanges.text: 2025년 세 분기 누계 기준 관세 관련 비용의 EPS 영향은 약 0.16달러에 달했으나, Q4에는 관세 비용이 미미한 수준이 될 것으로 예상했다.

businessChanges.text: 브랜드 네임 밸류 상품 구성과 신규 마케팅 캠페인이 소비자 반응을 이끌며 분기 전반에 걸쳐 상품 카테고리 및 지역별 광범위한 매출 성장을 달성했다.
Q3 중 자사주 매입 프로그램으로 2억 6,200만 달러를 집행했으며, FY2025 연간 10억 5,000만 달러 매입 계획을 예정대로 완료하겠다는 계획을 확인했다.

financialHighlights.text: Q3 FY2025 매출은 56억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 성장했으며, 영업이익률은 기대치를 크게 상회했다.
2025년 첫 아홉 달 누계 매출은 161억 달러, EPS는 4.61달러(관세 비용 0.16달러 포함)를 기록했다.
FY2025 연간 EPS 가이던스를 6.38~6.46달러(관세 비용 약 0.16달러 포함)로 상향 조정했다.
Q4 FY2025 EPS 가이던스는 1.77~1.85달러로 제시됐으며, 패키지웨이 비용 타이밍 영향(약 0.03달러)이 반영됐다.

watchItems.text: 관세 비용 약 0.16달러 EPS 희석에도 불구하고 동일점포매출이 강하게 성장한 점은 Off-price 모델의 탄력성을 보여주나, Q4 이후 관세 환경 변화 모니터링이 필요하다.
Q3 모멘텀 가속화와 연간 가이던스 상향이 긍정적이나, 자사주 매입 21억 달러 프로그램 진행 완료 후 주주환원 정책 방향에 관심이 필요하다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q325exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 _______________________________________________________________ FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: William W. Sheehan II Connie Kao Executive Vice President, Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Chief Financial Officer (925) 965-4668 (925) 965-4150 connie.kao@ros.com ROSS STORES EXCEEDS THIRD QUARTER EARNINGS GUIDANCE, RAISES FULL YEAR OUTLOOK Dublin, California, November 20, 2025 -- Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) today reported earnings per share for the 13 weeks ended November 1, 2025 of $1.58 on net income of $512 million. Included in this year’s third quarter earnings is an approximate $0.05 per share negative impact from tariff-related costs. These results compare to earnings per share of $1.48 on net income of $489 million  Normalized numeric aliases: $512 million = 5억 1,200만 달러; $489 million = 4억 8,900만 달러; $5.6 billion = 56억 달러; $1.58 = 1.58달러; $512 = 512달러; $0.05 = 0.05달러; $1.48 = 1.48달러; $489 = 489달러; $5.6 = 5.6달러.

versus $5.1 billion in the prior year. Comparable store sales increased a strong 7%. For the nine months ended November 1, 2025, earnings per share were $4.61 on net earnings of $1.5 billion, versus $4.53 per share on net income of $1.5 billion for the same year-to-date period in 2024. Year-to-date 2025 earnings include an approximate $0.16 per share negative impact from tariff-related costs. Sales for the first nine months of 2025 were $16.1 billion, with comparable store sales up 3% over the prior year. Jim Conroy, Chief Executive Officer, commented, “We are pleased with our third quarter sales results, which accelerated from the prior quarter. Our merchandise assortment of compelling brand name values resonated with shoppers, and our new marketing campaign drove excitement and higher customer  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.1 billion = 51억 달러; $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $16.1 billion = 161억 달러; $5.1 = 5.1달러; $4.61 = 4.61달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $4.53 = 4.53달러; $0.16 = 0.16달러; $16.1 = 16.1달러.

the balance of the quarter. The strong execution by the entire team led to broad-based sales growth across merchandise areas and geographical regions. The strength in top-line, coupled with our continued focus on expense control, resulted in an operating margin of 11.6% that was much stronger than expected.” ROSS STORES, INC. 5130 Hacienda Drive, Dublin, CA 94568 (925) 965-4400 Update on Shareholder Payouts During the third quarter of fiscal 2025, a total of 1.7 million shares of common stock were repurchased for an aggregate price of $262 million under the Company’s two-year $2.1 billion authorization approved by its Board of Directors in March 2024. The Company remains on track to buy back a total of $1.05 billion in common stock during fiscal 2025 and complete the program as planned. Fiscal 2025 Guidance  Normalized numeric aliases: 1.7 million = 170만 달러; $262 million = 2억 6,200만 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $1.05 billion = 10억 5,000만 달러; $262 = 262달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $1.05 = 1.05달러.

and are well-positioned to offer a compelling merchandise assortment across all our stores. As a result, for the 13 weeks ending January 31, 2026, we are raising our comparable store sales forecast to be up 3% to 4% with earnings per share in the range of $1.77 to $1.85. This updated guidance range reflects approximately $0.03 earnings per share of unfavorable timing of packaway-related expenses that benefited the third quarter. In addition, we now expect tariff-related costs to be negligible in the fourth quarter.” Mr. Conroy continued, “Based on our year-to-date results and updated fourth quarter forecast, we are increasing our earnings per share guidance for fiscal 2025 to be in the range of $6.38 to $6.46, which includes approximately $0.16 per share negative impact from tariff-related costs. In addition, and as a reminder, 2024 fourth quarter and full year  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.77 = 1.77달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러; $0.03 = 0.03달러; $6.38 = 6.38달러; $6.46 = 6.46달러; $0.16 = 0.16달러.
